description_long: This object is a stylized crab with a vibrant red-orange exoskeleton and two prominent, oversized claws. The claws are dark purple with ornate, decorative patterns etched onto their surfaces, contrasting sharply with the rest of the body. The crab's body is boxy and angular, with segmented legs that are jointed and splayed outward, giving it a dynamic, lifelike posture. Two slender antennae extend from the top of the carapace, and the eyes are positioned on short stalks. The surface of the crab appears hard and slightly matte, with subtle texturing to suggest a natural shell. The overall design is both whimsical and detailed, making it visually striking in an urban food context.
description: A stylized red-orange crab with ornate purple claws, segmented legs, and antennae, featuring a hard, textured shell.
description_view_0: Side view showing one large ornate purple claw and four segmented legs, with antennae visible on top.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting both large purple claws, symmetrical leg arrangement, and antennae extending upward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the other large claw and four legs visible, plus the carapace's angular shape.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the broad, flat carapace, all legs splayed outward, and both claws extending backward.
